commands.repair_reason: No repair lane: this is an active maintainer-labeled contributor PR with no concrete fixable review finding; maintainers should review and merge through the normal PR flow.; Cleared: The diff touches Discord delivery accounting, focused tests, and changelog only, with no dependency, CI, secrets, permission, or third-party execution changes. commands.review_summary:
The PR updates Discord final reply delivery and auto-reply dispatch accounting so empty final outbound results are treated as failed, with status-reaction regression tests and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. By source inspection, current main can queue a Discord final reply, receive no delivered outbound result, omit dispatcher failed counts from the dispatch result, and still mark the Discord turn done; I did not run a live Discord turn in this read-only review.
